material.name: Target: Low-index Copper facets
material.notes: Requesting spectral data for ANY pure copper surface (111, 100, or 110). Must be performed at room temperature under vacuum or He. [sample_form flexible — film preferred] [intent: synthesis requested]

configuration.notes: Requesting a beamline capability, not a specific instrument.

independent_variables.name: energy
independent_variables.notes: Must cover Cu K-edge (8979 eV) with at least 50 eV post-edge.
